allow: Bash(python -c " from pypdf import PdfReader files = [ \('3주차', 'C:/minkang_github/H_Univ_4/결혼학개론/강의록들/3주차_건강한연대와진정한자립\(강의안\).pdf'\), \('4주차', 'C:/minkang_github/H_Univ_4/결혼학개론/강의록들/4주차_사랑과친밀한관계형성\(강의안\).pdf'\), \('5주차', 'C:/minkang_github/H_Univ_4/결혼학개론/강의록들/5주차_배우자선택과결혼준비\(강의안\).pdf'\), \('6주차', 'C:/minkang_github/H_Univ_4/결혼학개론/강의록들/6주차_친밀한폭력\(강의안\).pdf'\), ] for week, path in files: print\(f'===== {week} ====='\) reader = PdfReader\(path\) for page in reader.pages: text = page.extract_text\(\) if text: print\(text\) print\(\) ")
